mdRecord.dcterms:title: Presbyterian Church, Floyd, Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:description: A photograph of the Presbyterian Church on Main Street, Floyd, Virginia taken on October 29, 1950. There is a note on the edge "Rev. John Kellogg Harrise, paster, 50 years, died 1916" The back of the photo has the name "Mrs. Susan Harris Hall. Floyd, Virginia" hand writen on it.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Presbyterian Church
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
